defaultDescription: PartGenie helps engineers find electronic component specs, datasheets, and in-stock alternatives — powered by AI sourcing from weeks to minutes.

manufacturerDirectory.title: Electronic Component Manufacturers Directory | PartGenie
manufacturerDirectory.description: Electronic component manufacturers indexed by category and name — with PartGenie intelligence for alternatives, supply context, and BOM analysis.

manufacturerDirectoryCategory.title: {category} Manufacturers Directory | PartGenie
manufacturerDirectoryCategory.description: Explore {category} manufacturers with curated intelligence hubs, popular families, alternatives context, and sourcing considerations.

manufacturerDirectoryLetter.title: Manufacturers Starting with {letter} | PartGenie
manufacturerDirectoryLetter.description: Browse electronics manufacturers whose names start with {letter}. Explore intelligence hubs for alternatives, supply insights, and BOM analysis.

component.title: {mpn} AI Component Analysis: Specs, Uses, Alternatives & Risks | PartGenie
component.description: AI-powered review of {mpn} specs, applications, design considerations, replacement risks, and alternative components from {manufacturer}. Compare pin-compatible options and analyze {mpn} in your BOM with PartGenie.

alternative.title: Best {mpn} Alternatives & Cross References | PartGenie
alternative.description: Find {mpn} alternatives, pin-compatible replacements, and functional equivalents from {manufacturer}. Compare package risks, application fit, and sourcing options for {category} designs.

compare.title: {mpnA} vs {mpnB}: Specs, Differences & Replacement Guide | PartGenie
compare.description: Compare {mpnA} ({mfgA}) and {mpnB} ({mfgB}) by specifications, package, pin compatibility, applications, sourcing risk, and drop-in replacement suitability.

manufacturer.title: {name} Components, Alternatives & Market Analysis | PartGenie
manufacturer.description: Explore {name} components, popular product families, comparable manufacturers, replacement options, applications, and sourcing considerations — curated intelligence, not a full catalog.

answer.title: Best {category} for {useCase}: Selection Guide | PartGenie
answer.description: Compare {category} options for {useCase} by performance, power, interfaces, package, ecosystem, sourcing availability, and design tradeoffs. Curated part recommendations for engineers.

categoryFinder.title: {categoryLabel} Component Finder & Selection Guide | PartGenie
categoryFinder.description: Find curated {categoryLabel} options with engineering-oriented filters, replacement guidance, and related intelligence pages. Built for fast BOM decision-making.
